name: ThinkBrowse Agentic Design System
description: Complete implementation guide for the ThinkBrowse design system. Includes tokens, components, and usage patterns.

layout.header: bg-white border-b border-gray-200 shrink-0 z-10 h-16 px-6 flex items-center justify-between
layout.leftColumn: w-3/5 flex flex-col p-6 overflow-y-auto border-r border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/50
layout.rightColumn: w-2/5 flex flex-col bg-white border-l border-gray-200

pageHeader.title: font-serif text-xl text-gray-900
pageHeader.meta: flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5

components.sectionHeading: text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4

tabBar.container: flex gap-1 bg-white border border-gray-200 p-1 rounded-lg w-fit shadow-sm
tabBar.active: px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 rounded-md
tabBar.inactive: px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 rounded-md transition-colors
tabBar.badge: bg-red-100 text-red-700 text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full

primary.class: px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-button transition-colors

secondary.class: px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-button border transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

button.link: text-xs text-blue-600 hover:underline flex items-center gap-1

interventionBanner.container: mb-6 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm
interventionBanner.title: text-lg font-semibold text-red-900

browserFrame.container: flex-1 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-panel shadow-strong overflow-hidden flex flex-col min-h-[500px]
browserFrame.chromeBar: h-10 bg-gray-100 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center px-4 gap-4 shrink-0
browserFrame.urlBar: bg-white rounded-md px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 max-w-md w-full border border-gray-200 shadow-sm
browserFrame.note: Static layout only — no animate-float, no backdrop-blur, no scale transforms

taskStep.iconDone: mt-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-green-100 text-green-600 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0
taskStep.iconFailed: mt-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-red-100 text-red-600 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0
taskStep.iconPending: mt-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full border-2 border-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 opacity-40

executionLog.connectingLine: absolute left-[15px] top-[24px] bottom-6 w-0.5 bg-gray-100
executionLog.numberCircle: absolute left-0 top-0 w-8 h-8 bg-white border-2 border-gray-200 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center z-10
executionLog.interventionCircle: absolute left-0 top-0 w-8 h-8 bg-red-100 border-2 border-red-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center z-10 animate-pulse
executionLog.interventionCard: bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-3 shadow-sm

standard.class: p-3 rounded-card border border-gray-100 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

highlight.class: p-3 rounded-card border border-brand-orange-100 bg-brand-orange-50 hover:bg-brand-orange-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer

agent.container: relative bg-white rounded-input shadow-medium border border-gray-100 p-2 flex items-center gap-2 focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-brand-orange-100 transition-shadow
agent.field: flex-1 bg-transparent border-none outline-none text-lg placeholder-gray-400 text-gray-800 h-10
agent.usage: Main task input on landing/activity pages

glassPanel.note: DEPRECATED for session detail pages. Use plain bg-white panels instead.
glassPanel.usage: Landing page only, not in session detail

thoughtStream.note: See executionLog component above for the session detail spec. ThoughtStream.tsx implements this.

heroSection.description: Landing page hero with centered content and agent input
heroSection.example: ThinkBrowse

liveSession.description: Glass panel with browser frame, thought stream, and activity logs

aria.status: Use aria-live for dynamic content updates

responsive.strategy: Desktop-first for main site, graceful mobile degradation

do: Use cream (#FDFBF9) as page background — never pure white
Use Instrument Serif only for page-level session/task titles
Use JetBrains Mono for all technical data: IDs, timestamps, URLs, badge labels
Color-code action badges consistently per the actionBadge component above
Stack Task Plan and Execution Log vertically in the right panel — both visible by scrolling
Use numbered white circles for execution log entries
Use red-tinted cards + animated pulse circle for INTERVENTION REQUIRED entries
Use pill-style tab bars (bg-gray-100 active state) for left panel tabs
dont: Don't use tabs in the right observability panel — stacked layout only
Don't apply animate-float to any structural element in session detail
Don't use backdrop-blur or glassmorphism in session detail pages
Don't add the Artifacts tab to the left panel (not in spec)
Don't use orange underline indicators for active tabs — use pill/bg-gray-100
Don't use scale transforms on the browser frame
